creator: pfg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 182348
Update and minor cleanups

Bring new version with some updates to the documentation: split the large document and include OCR information.

Minor source code rearrangement.
patch-sb_Makefile --> patch-src_Makefile

Maintain this again.

For reference:

% make check-plist
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> No pkg-plist issues found (check-plist)
% portlint
looks fine.
